info.name: Basmati Rice And Sona Mug Dal
Mutton Keema Masala And Basmati Rice
French Fry
info.description: Crispy golden strips of delight, perfect to kickstart your feast.

info.name: Crispy Chicken
info.description: Bite-sized chicken pieces deep-fried till golden and crunchy, then lightly tossed in seasoning. A perfect balance of crisp texture and juicy chicken in every bite.

info.name: Original Vetki Fish Fry [1 Pcs]
info.description: Bhetki fish fry is a delicious and popular Bengali dish made with bhetki fish, also known as Asian sea bass or barramundi. It is a crispy and flavorful fried fish preparation that can be served as an appetizer or a main course.

info.name: Original Vetki Fish Finger [5 Pcs]
info.description: Crumb-coated bhetki fish fingers fried till golden. Crisp outside with soft, flaky fish inside.

info.name: Prawn Pakora
info.description: Juicy prawns coated in a spiced batter and deep-fried. Crisp, flavourful, and indulgent.

info.name: Paneer Pakora [6 Pcs]
info.description: Delight your taste buds with these flavorful, deep-fried paneer fritters, perfect for starting any meal.

info.name: Chicken Pakora [6 Pcs]
info.description: Delicately fried chicken fritters that tantalize the taste buds with their savory flavor and crispy texture.

info.name: Egg Chicken Tarka
info.description: A hearty combination of chicken and boiled eggs cooked in a spiced gravy with a finishing tadka. Rich, filling, and flavourful.

info.name: Prawn Masala
info.description: Prawns simmered in a thick, spiced onion-tomato gravy. Bold flavours with a rich finish.

info.name: Paneer Do Pyaza
info.description: Paneer tossed with generous onions in a thick, spiced tomato gravy. Slightly tangy, mildly sweet, and full-bodied.

info.name: Prawn Do Pyza
info.description: Prawns cooked with generous onions in a thick, spiced gravy. Slightly sweet, savoury, and aromatic.

info.name: Handi Chicken
info.description: Chicken cooked in a rich, slow-simmered gravy with aromatic spices. Smooth, comforting, and full-bodied.

info.name: Fish Masala
info.description: Fish cooked in a thick onion-tomato masala with aromatic spices. Rich, hearty, and satisfying.

info.name: Kadai Fish
info.description: A flavorful and succulent fish dish cooked to perfection, bursting with rich and aromatic flavors.

info.name: Dal Fry
info.description: Yellow lentils cooked to a creamy consistency and tempered with garlic, cumin, and ghee. Simple, homestyle, and full of flavour.

info.name: Egg Curry
info.description: Boiled eggs cooked in a traditional curry with aromatic spices. Homestyle, mildly spiced, and comforting.

info.name: Chicken Bharta
info.description: Shredded chicken cooked in a thick, rustic masala. Rich, spicy, and deeply satisfying.

info.name: Chicken Keema Masala
info.description: Minced chicken cooked in a spiced onion-tomato masala. Hearty, flavourful, and comforting.

info.name: Chicken Butter Masala
info.description: Tender chicken cooked in a buttery tomato gravy finished with cream. Mildly sweet, rich, and universally loved.

info.name: Mushroom Masala
info.description: Tender mushrooms cooked in a thick, aromatic masala with tomatoes and spices. Rich, hearty, and satisfying.

info.name: Chicken Do Pyza
info.description: Chicken cooked with generous onions in a thick, spiced gravy. Slightly sweet, savoury, and flavour-packed.

info.name: Chicken Korma
info.description: Tender chicken simmered in a mild, creamy gravy with aromatic spices. Rich, smooth, and indulgent.

info.name: Kadai Chicken
info.description: A delectable and flavorful chicken dish cooked in a traditional Indian style, perfect for a satisfying and filling main course.

info.name: Kadai Paneer
info.description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian delight, showcasing fresh paneer and a rich blend of spices, guaranteed to satisfy your taste buds.

info.name: Shahi Paneer
info.description: Paneer cooked in a rich, creamy cashew-based gravy with aromatic spices. Mild, indulgent, and fit for special occasions.

info.name: Paneer Butter Masala
info.description: Soft paneer simmered in a buttery tomato gravy finished with cream. Smooth, mildly sweet, and universally loved.

info.name: Matar Paneer
info.description: Soft paneer cubes and green peas simmered in a spiced tomato-based gravy. A classic North Indian favourite with balanced flavours.

info.name: Chicken Kadhai
info.description: A flavorful and savory non-veg delight, the Chicken Kosa is a delectable main course that will leave your taste buds satisfied.

info.name: Chicken Tarka
info.description: A succulent non-veg delight that promises a burst of flavors in every bite, perfect as a main course.

info.name: Chicken Curry
info.description: Chicken simmered in a traditional onion-tomato curry with balanced spices. A classic, everyday favourite.

info.name: Gobi Masala
info.description: Cauliflower florets cooked in a rich, spiced tomato-onion gravy. Flavourful, mildly spicy, and comforting.

info.name: Mix Vegetables
info.description: A delightful medley of garden-fresh vegetables showcasing vibrant flavors in a satisfying main course.

info.name: Chana Masala
info.description: A delightful vegetarian main course bursting with rich flavors and aromatic spices.

info.name: Green Peas Masala
info.description: Sweet green peas cooked in a mildly spiced onion-tomato gravy. Light, flavourful, and perfect for everyday meals.

info.name: Aloo Dum
info.description: A flavorful and aromatic vegetarian delicacy that is perfect for a hearty main course.

info.name: Egg Masala
info.description: Boiled eggs tossed in a rich, spiced masala gravy. Robust, flavour-packed, and satisfying.

info.name: Egg Kosha
info.description: A delectable egg delight that is sure to please your taste buds with its rich and savory flavors.

info.name: Peshawari Chicken
info.description: Chicken cooked in a rich, mildly spiced gravy with nutty undertones. Smooth, aromatic, and indulgent.

info.name: Chicken Lahori
info.description: Chicken cooked in a bold, spicy Lahori-style masala. Rich flavours with a fiery finish.

info.name: Chicken Rara
info.description: A hearty combination of chicken pieces and spiced chicken keema in a rich gravy. Bold, indulgent, and flavour-forward.

info.name: Handi Mutton
info.description: An aromatic and flavorful delicacy featuring tender mutton cooked to perfection in a traditional handi, highlighting rich and succulent flavors.

info.name: Mutton Do Paiza
info.description: A succulent and flavorful main course capturing the richness of mutton in a tantalizing blend of spices and flavors.

info.name: Mutton Kosa
info.description: A succulent and flavorful non-veg delight that satisfies as a delectable main course option.

info.name: Mutton Curry
info.description: Slow-cooked mutton simmered in a traditional spiced curry. Rich, hearty, and comforting.

info.name: Peas Pulao
info.description: Basmati rice cooked with green peas and whole spices. Lightly spiced and subtly fragrant.

info.name: Basmati Rice
info.description: A fragrant and flavorful rice dish that perfectly complements any Indian meal.

info.name: Tawa Roti
info.description: Soft whole-wheat flatbread cooked on a tawa. Light, simple, and perfect with curries.

info.name: Gobindo Bhog Chaler Pulao
info.description: Delicious aromatic rice dish bursting with flavors.

info.name: Jeera Rice
info.description: Basmati rice tempered with cumin seeds and light spices. Simple, aromatic, and comforting.

info.name: Rumali Roti
info.description: Thin, soft flatbread cooked till light and airy. Ideal for rich gravies and kebabs.

info.name: Chicken Fried Rice
info.description: Fragrant fried rice tossed with tender chicken pieces and vegetables. Balanced flavours with a savoury finish.

info.name: Mixed Fried Rice
info.description: Basmati rice cooked with assorted vegetables and mild spices. Colourful, flavourful, and well balanced.

info.name: Egg Chowmein
info.description: Noodles stir-fried with scrambled eggs, vegetables, and sauces. Comforting, savoury, and well balanced.

info.name: Garlic Chicken
info.description: Succulent chicken stir-fried with generous amounts of garlic, soy sauce, and aromatic spices. Rich, savoury flavours with a strong garlic-forward finish.

info.name: Veg Chowmein
info.description: Stir-fried noodles tossed with fresh vegetables and light sauces. Classic Indo-Chinese flavours with a mild spice level.

info.name: Chilli Fish
info.description: Tender fish cooked with a delightful Chinese gravy or prepared dry with a burst of flavors.

info.name: Mix Chowmin
info.description: A generous mix of vegetables, eggs, and chicken tossed with noodles. Rich in flavour and perfect for sharing.

info.name: Chili Prawn (Gravy + Dry)
info.description: Tender prawns in a delectable Chinese-style gravy combined with a delightful dry preparation.

info.name: Chicken Chowmine
info.description: Soft noodles tossed with tender chicken and vegetables in Indo-Chinese sauces. Hearty, flavourful, and satisfying.

info.name: Chicken Salt & Pepper
info.description: Lightly battered chicken tossed with cracked black pepper, garlic, and spring onions. Simple yet bold flavours with a crisp texture and peppery finish.

info.name: Prawn Salt Red Pepper
info.description: A delightful Chinese dish featuring succulent prawns seasoned to perfection, creating a culinary symphony of flavors.

info.name: Chili Chicken Dry
info.description: A delectable Chinese delight that combines succulent chicken with a tantalizing blend of flavors and textures.

info.name: Chili Chicken Gravy
info.description: A flavorful Chinese delicacy featuring succulent chicken in a tantalizing gravy.

info.name: Manchurian Chicken
info.description: A delectable Chinese delight featuring succulent chicken cooked to perfection with a flavorful twist- an irresistible choice for non-veg lovers.

info.name: Egg Fried Rice
info.description: Fried rice tossed with scrambled eggs and vegetables. Mildly seasoned with a soft, comforting texture.

info.name: Veg Fried Rice
info.description: Stir-fried rice tossed with fresh vegetables, soy sauce, and mild seasoning. Light, flavourful, and satisfying.

info.name: Katla Kalia
info.description: Katla fish cooked in a thick, spiced Bengali kalia gravy. Rich, aromatic, and perfect with steamed rice.

info.name: Bhapa Elish
info.description: Hilsa fish marinated in mustard and green chillies, steamed to perfection. Bold mustard flavours with soft, flaky fish.

info.name: Sona Mug Dal
info.description: Light and comforting yellow moong dal cooked till smooth and tempered with cumin and mild spices. A wholesome, everyday Bengali-style preparation.

info.name: Mix Veg Raita
info.description: Creamy curd mixed with chopped vegetables and mild spices. Cooling, light, and perfect with spicy dishes.

info.name: Chingri Malai Curry
info.description: Prawns cooked in a creamy coconut milk gravy with mild spices. Rich, aromatic, and indulgently smooth.

info.name: Green Salad
info.description: A fresh mix of seasonal greens and vegetables. Light, crunchy, and refreshing.

info.name: Vatki Paturi
info.description: Tantalizing Bengali delicacy enveloped in aromatic leaves, highlighting flavors that leave a lingering savor on your palate.

info.name: Desi Katla Bhapa
info.description: Katla fish marinated in mustard paste and spices, then steamed. Simple, aromatic, and traditionally flavoured.

info.name: Kochupata Bhapa Chingri
info.description: Fresh prawns marinated with mustard, green chillies, and spices, steamed in taro leaves. Aromatic, traditional, and delicately spiced.

info.name: Lau Chingri
info.description: Bottle gourd cooked with prawns in a light, subtly spiced gravy. Simple, fragrant, and comforting.

info.name: Sukto
info.description: A traditional Bengali mixed vegetable dish with subtle bitterness and light spices. Balanced, wholesome, and deeply comforting.

info.name: Aamer Chatni
info.description: Sweet and tangy mango chutney cooked with traditional spices. A classic Bengali accompaniment with a refreshing finish.

info.name: Mughlai Paratha
info.description: Flaky paratha stuffed with spiced egg mixture and shallow-fried till golden. Rich, filling, and indulgent.

info.name: Chicken Mughlai Paratha
info.description: Mughlai paratha stuffed with spiced chicken and egg filling. Crisp outside with a juicy, flavourful centre.

info.name: Laccha Paratha
info.description: Layered, flaky paratha cooked till crisp and golden. Soft inside with a buttery finish.
